pages.text: A Demonic Contract is written on parchment made for the resurrected flesh of the dead. The contract is signed in blood of the individual to whom it pertains. A $(item)Plain$() Demonic Contract is used to make a deal with $(l:creatures/imp)Flame Imps$(/l).

pages.title: Creation and Binding
pages.text: A Demonic Contract can be crafted using $(item)Paper$(), $(item)String$() and $(l:resources/raw_porkchop)Raw Porkchop?$(/l). To bind the Contract, craft it with a $(l:artifacts/misc/taglock_kit)Taglock Kit$(/l) containing the blood of the witch or warlock.

pages.title: Types of Contracts
pages.description: $(8)> $()$(item)Fiery Touch$() ($(item)Blaze Rod$(), $(l:herbology/ember_moss)Ember Moss$(/l)): Causes random fires to erupt when the victim interacts with objects.$(p)$(8)> $()$(item)Melting Touch$() ($(item)Lava Bucket$()): Causes harvested blocks to be instantly smelted. May double $(item)Ores$().

pages.text: $(8)> $()$(item)Living Flame$() ($(item)Blaze Rod$(), $(l:resources/clay_jars#hint_of_rebirth)Hint of Rebirth$(/l)): Summons a $(item)Blaze$() to attack the victim$(p)$(8)> $()$(item)Evaporation$() ($(item)Blaze Rod$(), $(item)Magma Cream$()): Causes the victim to evaporate nearby Water$(p)$(8)> $()$(item)Fiery Tolerance$() ($(item)Blaze Powder$()): Grants a long duration resistance to heat and fire.

pages.title: Imp Magic
pages.text: Imp Magic is used to make Imps cast fire-related spells at the request of their masters. Craft with a $(l:artifacts/misc/demonic_contract)Demonic Contract$(/l) with the items for the spell, then bound it using a $(l:artifacts/misc/taglock_kit)Taglock Kit$(/l). Once given to the Imp, it will start casting the spell if their master is not too far away.$(p)Imp Magic effects can be removed by dying or eating a $(l:resources/frozen_heart)Frozen Heart$(/l).
